TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Marshall_Brown, title = Marshall_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marshall_Brown} }

S.FORM: Marshall Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1918 , ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 6, Marshall Brown, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2008) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Marshall Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1918 , ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 6, Marshall Brown, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2008) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mars~ɕħall βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, mars~ɕħall βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
